lane: Devastating soul vocal performances. Stax/Hi/Atlantic/Malaco. The 'damn that's strong' single-track gut-punch.
duplicate_to_flag: Tyrone Davis - Heart Failure (Single Version) appears twice (positions 1 and 5)
